title: Future HUD (Advancement Plaques)
description: For use with the Advancement Plaques mod, gives them a futuristic-HUD look.
body:
This resource pack replaces the default look of advancement plaques with a futuristic-HUD look.

Note: This resource pack requires Advancement Plaques to function.

 

 

You may use this resource pack in modpacks.  Make sure you include Advancement Plaques!

 

Problems, feature request, something else?  Join us on Discord!
